get.description: Returns paginated admin members for the authenticated user's school.

get.summary: List all submissions for an assessment

post.summary: Create a submission for an assessment

get.description: Returns all attendance records for the given student group and date.
get.summary: Get attendance for a group on a date

post.description: Creates or updates attendance records for a student group on a given date. Teacher identity is taken from the authenticated session.

get.description: Returns paginated attendance records for the given student membership.

post.description: Creates the user account if it does not exist, then emails a one-time login link.
Exchanges the one-time token from the magic link for a session token.

get.description: Returns all available education systems (e.g. Kenya CBC, IB, IGCSE).
Returns all grade levels for the given education system, ordered by sequence.
get.summary: List grade levels by education system

post.description: Creates a new grade level for the given education system.

get.description: Lists school invitations with optional status and role filters. Only admins.

post.description: Sends invitation emails to multiple people. Only admins can send invitations.

delete.description: Revokes a pending invitation. Only admins.

post.description: Regenerates token and resends invitation email. Only admins.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's membership with nested user, tenant, and school objects.

post.description: Creates a tenant, school, and admin membership for the logged-in user in a single transaction.
post.summary: Onboard a new tenant and school

get.description: Returns paginated parent members for the authenticated user's school.
Returns paginated students linked to the given parent membership.
get.summary: List students linked to a parent

post.description: Creates a guardian-student relationship. Only admins.
post.summary: Link a student to a parent

delete.description: Removes a guardian-student relationship. Only admins.
delete.summary: Unlink a student from a parent

get.description: Returns all student groups belonging to the authenticated user's school.

post.description: Creates a new student group in the authenticated user's school.

get.description: Returns all student memberships for the given student group.
get.summary: List student members of a group

post.description: Adds one or more student memberships to the given student group.
post.summary: Add student members to a group

delete.description: Removes the student with the given membership ID from the group.
delete.summary: Remove a student member from a group

get.description: Returns all teacher memberships for the given student group.
get.summary: List teacher members of a group

post.description: Adds one or more teacher memberships (with subjects) to the given student group.
post.summary: Add teacher members to a group

delete.description: Removes the teacher with the given membership ID and subject from the group.
delete.summary: Remove a teacher member from a group

get.description: Returns paginated student members for the authenticated user's school, optionally filtered by student group.

post.description: Creates multiple student accounts with optional student group enrollment. Only admins.

get.description: Returns paginated parents linked to the given student membership.
get.summary: List parents linked to a student

get.description: Returns all sub-topics for the given topic.

post.description: Creates a new sub-topic under the given topic.

get.description: Returns all subject attendance records for the given student group and date.
get.summary: Get subject attendance for a group on a date

post.description: Creates or updates subject attendance records for a student group, subject, and date. Teacher identity is taken from the authenticated session.
post.summary: Mark subject attendance for a group

get.description: Returns all custom subjects belonging to the current tenant.
get.summary: List subjects for the authenticated tenant

post.description: Creates a new subject under the authenticated tenant.

get.summary: Get all answers for a submission

put.summary: Set teacher remarks on a submission

get.description: Returns all student groups the authenticated teacher is assigned to.
get.summary: List student groups for the authenticated teacher

get.description: Returns paginated teacher members for the authenticated user's school, optionally filtered by student group.

get.summary: List time slots for the school

get.description: Returns all active timetable entries assigned to the authenticated teacher.
Returns all topics for the given subject.

post.description: Creates a new topic under the given subject.

user.description: Optional nested objects — populated by usecases when needed.
